reviews.review_description: Goes from being a breeze then impossible. Thank you for stealing my money. I'll make sure to never to purchase another of your products again.

developer_response.body: Hi if you are are having difficulty with the game, try reaching out to our community who would be happy to help to offer some tips. What level are you getting stuck on? We have a Discord server you can join and talk to other players at https://discord.gg/8mQWFec

reviews.review_description: As far as I can tell, this game is NOT acknowledging my (properly paired) game controller. Controller configuration screen is unresponsive and offers no help. With my Oculus Go controller, it relies heavily on using the touch pad “buttons” and is therefore unreliable and glitchy. Terrible. Unplayable.
Wow what a great game 10/8
Are there instructions available anywhere? Excellent graphics and immersive setting, but like other games imo it’s hard to figure out what the hell you’re suppose to do.

developer_response.body: Sorry there is no manual available. But we should make one to better explain all the UI icons.

reviews.review_description: I’m a pretty skeptical and critical person with VR games, especially games that start reaching 10$ range. You will get lost in this game it is that immersive lol.

Love the visuals, controls and music. The overall vibe is great and feels closer to Elite, EVE etc. than a mobile game, particularly on Oculus Go. It’s amazing that a 2-person studio can create an experience better than CCP (makers of EVE) have for this platform (or even Oculus studios)!

I know the developers are working on more levels. I would say that what prevents this from being a 6/5 star game for me is the lack of multiplayer. Having that will make it unable to put down as you live out being a space pilot in a universe with others. It doesn’t have to be elaborate or with an economy: even a pretty basic co-op along with randomized missions and/or PVP arena with some different environments (plus leaderboard) would add so much. 

Plus, multiplayer is a path to endless replay-ability and content without them having to churn it out feverishly, as other humans allow for endless variation and unpredictability that no amount of levels can equal!

I’m holding back just one star for that, but still my top two gaming experiences on Oculus Go
Good game but motion sickness catches up to you.

This game looks great but can't be played with my moga pocket gamepad. It works in the menu but not ingame � I hope you will release an update that fixes this issue. My gamepad works flawless in other apps.

developer_response.body: If you have both the Gear VR controller and the Moga connected there is a bug that prevents both being used. Disconnect the Gear VR controller before using the Moga. This will be fixed in a future update.

reviews.review_description: My Oculus Go got an overheating warning, after play +/- 30 minutes, maybe this games make Oculus Go "pushing the limit" so there is a lot of heat generates

Very cool game, with enormous 3d feel to it. Played it in my office chair with Gear Vr controller and it really felt like I was flying for real in space.
Only downside to the game is that it's really short. Only 6 or 7 missions.

First impression was the graphics were great and it was very immersive, but the controls were a pain and it made me motion sick. I returned after getting more used to VR, switched the control to joystick flying rather than gaze flying (gaze for shooting instead), and loved it. Combat is hard, but that's good because it's more rewarding and the game lasts longer.
Tweak the controls and it's a solid space shooter!
Played for 5 minutes and got really bad motion sickness.. looks good but I feel sick now

developer_response.body: Hi sorry to hear that. There are multiple options in the settings menu to try out different control methods. Some are more comfortable then others. Try some other options out and I'm sure you can find one that works for you.

reviews.review_description: The only reason I dont give this game 5 stars is because it is short. There are only a few levels. But great game, great graphics.

Excellent game on the go and the controller generally works well though as with a lot of games that implement directional control or functions on the circular pad it can be hit and miss ( press up and it goes left or right , press right you go up or down) but this is the go controller fault . Game wise it plays well and looks great and certainly if you love space flying games this would be your first port of call to get

I've been trying to download this game for about a week now. I've tried my wifi, and data, running overnight to download it, I've tried downloading it throughout the day, and no matter how far it gets, it eventually pops up with a "cannot download." Very infuriating, as I'm sure it is a good game, but I have no way to find out.

developer_response.body: Sorry to hear that. Make sure to contact Oculus support. If you can't download the game it is a Oculus store problem and not a problem with the game. If you need more help feel free to reach out to me at justin@endspacevr.com

reviews.review_description: I bought this game a few days ago. It downloads half of it and then suddenly stops. I’ve been trying several times and still doesn’t work. Help please!

developer_response.body: Hi, try logging in and out of the Oculus app as well as restarting your Oculus Go. If you still need more help email me at justin@endspacevr.com

reviews.review_description: Awesome game, a must.

This was one my my first downloads for my go. Good game so far. Had a bit of trouble with the missiles found you have to press the very bottom of the touch pad. Once that was sorted out it is a joy to play.

Gamepad is not supported as it says in description. 😤

My gamepad is Nimbus by Steelseries

developer_response.body: What gamepad do you have? Most are supported. Email me at justin@endspacevr.com before leaving a bad review try contacting support.
